---
title: "Tom_Bahadurabad_Streamflow_data"
author: "Naman Kishan Rastogi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.




**Plot SST SLP Wind as a spatial plot in TROPICAL INDO-PACIFIC sub continent: all wind vectors marked**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(ggquiver)
library(metR)
library(maps)  # for world2


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Plot_IVT_SLP_Wind_Together/")


phases      <- c("Early", "Peak", "Late", "Monsoon")
cond_levels <- c("Dry", "Normal", "Wet")  
fix_lon     <- function(lon) ifelse(lon < 0, lon + 360, lon)


tag_x <- 32
tag_y <- -14


sst_all <- map_dfr(c("Wet", "Normal", "Dry"), function(cond) {
  file <- paste0("SST/SST_", cond, "_years_anomalies.csv")
  read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      Condition    = cond,
      phase        = factor(Phase, levels = phases),
      lon          = fix_lon(Lon),
      lat          = Lat,
      mean_anomaly = Mean_anomaly
    )
}) %>%
  mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = cond_levels))


slp_all <- map_dfr(c("Wet", "Normal", "Dry"), function(cond) {
  file <- paste0("SLP/SLP_Seasonal_Phase_Anomalies_", cond, "_Years.csv")
  read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      Condition = cond,
      phase     = factor(phase, levels = phases),
      lon       = fix_lon(lon)
    )
}) %>%
  mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = cond_levels))


uwnd_all <- map_dfr(c("Wet", "Normal", "Dry"), function(cond) {
  file <- paste0("UWIND/uwnd_seasonal_phase_anomalies_", cond, "_years.csv")
  read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(Condition = cond)
})

vwnd_all <- map_dfr(c("Wet", "Normal", "Dry"), function(cond) {
  file <- paste0("VWIND/vwnd_seasonal_phase_anomalies_", cond, "_years.csv")
  read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(Condition = cond)
})

wind_all <- left_join(uwnd_all, vwnd_all,
                      by = c("phase", "lon", "lat", "Condition")) %>%
  rename(uwnd = UWIND, vwnd = VwIND) %>%
  mutate(
    phase          = factor(phase, levels = phases),
    lon            = fix_lon(lon),
    wind_magnitude = sqrt(uwnd^2 + vwnd^2)
  ) %>%
  filter(row_number() %% 4 == 0) %>%        # reduce density
  mutate(Condition = factor(Condition, levels = cond_levels))


world2_map <- map_data("world2")


india_boundary <- st_read(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Tom_Flow_Bahad/June_11_Teleconn_analysis/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp",
  quiet = TRUE
) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 4326) %>%
  st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES", "DATELINEOFFSET=180")) %>%
  st_shift_longitude()

india_boundary_df <- india_boundary %>%
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") %>%
  st_cast("POLYGON") %>%
  mutate(id = row_number()) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING") %>%
  st_coordinates() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) %>%
  mutate(group = L1)


breaks_seq <- seq(-1, 1, by = 0.2)
color_palette <- c(
  "purple4", "purple", "deepskyblue", "skyblue",
  "white", "white",
  "green", "yellow", "darkorange", "red"
)


combined_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = sst_all,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = mean_anomaly)) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colors = color_palette,
    breaks = breaks_seq,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name   = "SST Anomaly (°C)",
    guide  = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      barwidth       = unit(6.5, "in"),
      barheight      = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      frame.colour   = "black",
      ticks.colour   = "black",
      label.position = "bottom"
    )
  ) +
  geom_polygon(data = world2_map,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_path(data = india_boundary_df,
            aes(x = lon, y = lat, group = group),
            color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_contour(data = dplyr::filter(slp_all, mean_anomaly > 0),
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               binwidth = 0.5, color = "red",
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_contour(data = dplyr::filter(slp_all, mean_anomaly < 0),
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               binwidth = 0.5, color = "mediumblue",
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_contour(data = slp_all,
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               breaks = 0, color = "blue",
               linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text_contour(data = slp_all,
                    aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
                    binwidth = 0.5, size = 3.2,
                    fontface = "bold", stroke = 0.5,
                    fill = "white", color = "black", skip = 0) +
  geom_quiver(data = wind_all,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, u = uwnd, v = vwnd),
              vecsize = 4.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(30, 300), ylim = c(-15, 25), expand = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(phase), cols = vars(Condition)) +
  labs(
    title = "SST, SLP & Wind Anomalies Across Seasons and Flow Conditions",
    x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", size = 0.2),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "#5A5A5A",
                                    fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(30, 300, by = 60)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-15, 25, by = 12.5))

labels_df <- expand_grid(
  Condition = factor(cond_levels, levels = cond_levels),
  phase     = factor(phases, levels = phases)
) %>%
  arrange(phase, Condition) %>%
  mutate(
    label = letters[1:12],
    x     = tag_x,
    y     = tag_y
  )

combined_plot <- combined_plot +
  geom_text(data = labels_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste0("(", label, ")")),
            hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
            size = 5.5, fontface = "bold", color = "red")


sst_dw  <- sst_all  %>% filter(Condition %in% c("Dry", "Wet"))
slp_dw  <- slp_all  %>% filter(Condition %in% c("Dry", "Wet"))
wind_dw <- wind_all %>% filter(Condition %in% c("Dry", "Wet"))

labels_dw <- expand_grid(
  Condition = factor(c("Dry", "Wet"), levels = c("Dry", "Wet")),
  phase     = factor(phases, levels = phases)
) %>%
  arrange(phase, Condition) %>%
  mutate(
    label = letters[1:8],
    x     = tag_x,
    y     = tag_y
  )

plot_dw <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = sst_dw, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = mean_anomaly)) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colors = color_palette,
    breaks = breaks_seq,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name   = "SST Anomaly (°C)",
    guide  = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      barwidth       = unit(6.5, "in"),
      barheight      = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      frame.colour   = "black",
      ticks.colour   = "black",
      label.position = "bottom"
    )
  ) +
  geom_polygon(data = world2_map,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_path(data = india_boundary_df,
            aes(x = lon, y = lat, group = group),
            color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_contour(data = dplyr::filter(slp_dw, mean_anomaly > 0),
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               binwidth = 0.5, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_contour(data = dplyr::filter(slp_dw, mean_anomaly < 0),
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               binwidth = 0.5, color = "mediumblue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_contour(data = slp_dw,
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               breaks = 0, color = "blue", linetype = "solid",linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text_contour(data = slp_dw,
                    aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
                    binwidth = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold",
                    stroke = 0.5, fill = "white", color = "black", skip = 0) +
  geom_quiver(data = wind_dw,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, u = uwnd, v = vwnd),
              vecsize = 4.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(30, 300), ylim = c(-15, 25), expand = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(phase), cols = vars(Condition)) +
  labs(
    title = "SST, SLP & Wind Anomalies (Dry & Wet Years)",
    x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", size = 0.2),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "#5A5A5A",
                                    fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(30, 300, by = 60)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-15, 25, by = 10)) +
  geom_text(data = labels_dw,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste0("(", label, ")")),
            hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
            size = 5.5, fontface = "bold", color = "red")

ggsave("SST_SLP_WIND_Anomalies_DryWet_4x2.png", plot = plot_dw,
       width = 16, height = 10.8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


sst_norm  <- sst_all  %>% filter(Condition == "Normal")
slp_norm  <- slp_all  %>% filter(Condition == "Normal")
wind_norm <- wind_all %>% filter(Condition == "Normal")

labels_norm <- tibble(
  Condition = factor("Normal", levels = "Normal"),
  phase     = factor(phases, levels = phases),
  label     = letters[1:4],
  x         = tag_x,
  y         = tag_y
)

plot_norm <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = sst_norm,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = mean_anomaly)) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colors = color_palette,
    breaks = breaks_seq,
    limits = c(-1, 1),
    name   = "SST Anomaly (°C)",
    guide  = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      barwidth       = unit(6.5, "in"),
      barheight      = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      frame.colour   = "black",
      ticks.colour   = "black",
      label.position = "bottom"
    )
  ) +
  geom_polygon(data = world2_map,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "gray90", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_path(data = india_boundary_df,
            aes(x = lon, y = lat, group = group),
            color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_contour(data = dplyr::filter(slp_norm, mean_anomaly > 0),
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               binwidth = 0.5, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_contour(data = dplyr::filter(slp_norm, mean_anomaly < 0),
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               binwidth = 0.5, color = "mediumblue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_contour(data = slp_norm,
               aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
               breaks = 0, color = "blue", linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text_contour(data = slp_norm,
                    aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
                    binwidth = 0.5, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold",
                    stroke = 0.5, fill = "white", color = "black", skip = 0) +
  geom_quiver(data = wind_norm,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, u = uwnd, v = vwnd),
              vecsize = 4.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(30, 300), ylim = c(-15, 25), expand = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(phase), cols = vars(Condition)) +
  labs(
    title = "SST, SLP & Wind Anomalies (Normal Years)",
    x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", size = 0.2),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "#5A5A5A",
                                    fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(30, 300, by = 60)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-15, 25, by = 12.5)) +
  geom_text(data = labels_norm,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste0("(", label, ")")),
            hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
            size = 5.5, fontface = "bold", color = "red")

ggsave("SST_SLP_WIND_Anomalies_Normal_4x1.png", plot = plot_norm,
       width = 8.5, height = 10.8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```



**Plot IVT SLP Wind as a spatial plot in Indian sub continent: all wind vectors marked**
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(ggquiver)
library(metR)
library(maps)


setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Plot_IVT_SLP_Wind_Together/")


phases     <- c("Early", "Peak", "Late", "Monsoon")
conditions <- c("Dry", "Normal", "Wet")  # ORDER: Dry, Normal, Wet
fix_lon    <- function(lon) ifelse(lon > 180, lon - 360, lon)


ivt_all <- map_dfr(conditions, function(cond) {
  read_csv(
    file = file.path("IVT", cond,
                     paste0("IVT_Seasonal_Phase_Anomalies_", cond, "_Years.csv"))
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      Condition = factor(cond, levels = conditions),
      phase     = factor(phase, levels = phases),
      lon       = fix_lon(lon)
    )
})

slp_all <- map_dfr(conditions, function(cond) {
  read_csv(
    file = file.path("SLP",
                     paste0("SLP_Seasonal_Phase_Anomalies_", cond, "_Years.csv"))
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      Condition = factor(cond, levels = conditions),
      phase     = factor(phase, levels = phases),
      lon       = fix_lon(lon)
    )
})


uwnd_all <- map_dfr(conditions, function(cond) {
  read_csv(
    file = file.path("UWIND",
                     paste0("uwnd_seasonal_phase_anomalies_", tolower(cond), "_years.csv"))
  ) %>%
    rename_with(tolower) %>%
    mutate(Condition = factor(cond, levels = conditions))
})

vwnd_all <- map_dfr(conditions, function(cond) {
  read_csv(
    file = file.path("VWIND",
                     paste0("vwnd_seasonal_phase_anomalies_", tolower(cond), "_years.csv"))
  ) %>%
    rename_with(tolower) %>%
    mutate(Condition = factor(cond, levels = conditions))
})

wind_all <- left_join(
  uwnd_all, vwnd_all,
  by = c("phase", "lon", "lat", "Condition")
) %>%
  rename(
    uwnd = any_of(c("uwnd", "uwind", "uwind_anom")),
    vwnd = any_of(c("vwnd", "vwind", "vwind_anom"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    phase          = factor(phase, levels = phases),
    lon            = fix_lon(lon),
    wind_magnitude = sqrt(uwnd^2 + vwnd^2)
  )

world2_map <- map_data("world2")

india_boundary <- st_read(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Tom_Flow_Bahad/June_11_Teleconn_analysis/India_Shape_File/India_Country_Boundary.shp"
) %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES", "DATELINEOFFSET=180")) %>%
  st_shift_longitude()

india_df <- india_boundary %>%
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") %>%
  st_cast("POLYGON") %>%
  mutate(id = row_number()) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING") %>%
  st_coordinates() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) %>%
  mutate(group = L1)

basin <- st_read(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Flow_Bahad/Tom_Flow_Bahad/June_11_Teleconn_analysis/BRB_Shape_Files/brahmaputra_basin.shp"
) %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_wrap_dateline(options = c("WRAPDATELINE=YES", "DATELINEOFFSET=180")) %>%
  st_shift_longitude()

basin_df <- basin %>%
  st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") %>%
  st_cast("POLYGON") %>%
  mutate(id = row_number()) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING") %>%
  st_coordinates() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) %>%
  mutate(group = L1)


labels_all <- expand_grid(
  Condition = factor(c("Dry", "Normal", "Wet"),
                     levels = c("Dry", "Normal", "Wet")),
  phase     = factor(phases, levels = phases)
) %>%
  arrange(phase, Condition) %>%
  mutate(
    label = letters[1:12],
    x     = 52,
    y     = -11
  )


labels_dw <- expand_grid(
  Condition = factor(c("Dry", "Wet"),
                     levels = c("Dry", "Wet")),
  phase     = factor(phases, levels = phases)
) %>%
  arrange(phase, Condition) %>%
  mutate(
    label = letters[1:8], 
    x     = 52,
    y     = -11
  )


labels_norm <- tibble(
  Condition = factor("Normal", levels = "Normal"),
  phase     = factor(phases, levels = phases),
  label     = letters[1:4],  # a–d
  x         = 52,
  y         = -11
)


make_ivt_slp_wind_plot <- function(ivt, slp, wind, labels, title_text) {

  ggplot() +
   
    geom_raster(data = ivt, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = mean_anomaly)) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "navy", high = "darkred", mid = "white",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-120, 120),
      breaks = seq(-120, 120, 20),
      name = expression("IVT Anomaly (kg"~m^-1~s^-1*")"),
      guide = guide_colorbar(
        title.position = "top",
        barwidth = unit(6.5, "in"),
        barheight = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        label.position = "bottom"
      )
    ) +

    geom_contour(
      data = dplyr::filter(slp, mean_anomaly > 0),
      aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
      binwidth = 0.15,
      colour   = "red",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.55
    ) +
    geom_contour(
      data = dplyr::filter(slp, mean_anomaly < 0),
      aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
      binwidth = 0.15,
      colour   = "mediumblue",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.55
    ) +
    geom_contour(
      data = slp,
      aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
      breaks   = 0,
      colour   = "blue",
      linetype = "solid",
      linewidth = 0.55
    ) +
    geom_text_contour(
      data = slp,
      aes(x = lon, y = lat, z = mean_anomaly),
      binwidth = 0.25,
      size     = 4,
      stroke   = 0.5,
      fontface = "bold",
      fill     = "white",
      colour   = "black"
    ) +

    geom_quiver(data = wind,
                aes(x = lon, y = lat, u = uwnd, v = vwnd),
                vecsize = 2.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +

    geom_polygon(data = world2_map,
                 aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
                 fill = NA, color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_path(data = india_df,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, group = group),
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_path(data = basin_df,
              aes(x = lon, y = lat, group = group),
              color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.5) +

    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(50, 120), ylim = c(-15, 45), expand = FALSE) +
    facet_grid(rows = vars(phase), cols = vars(Condition)) +
    labs(title = title_text, x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "lightblue", color = NA),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "#5A5A5A", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", size = 0.2),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 18),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 18),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.box = "vertical",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(50, 120, 15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-15, 45, 12.5)) +
    geom_text(
      data = labels,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste0("(", label, ")")),
      size = 5.5, color = "red", fontface = "bold"
    )
}


plot_ivt_all <- make_ivt_slp_wind_plot(
  ivt = ivt_all, slp = slp_all, wind = wind_all,
  labels = labels_all,
  title_text = "IVT, SLP & Wind Anomalies Across Seasons and Flow Conditions"
)


ivt_dw    <- ivt_all  %>% filter(Condition %in% c("Dry", "Wet"))
slp_dw    <- slp_all  %>% filter(Condition %in% c("Dry", "Wet"))
wind_dw   <- wind_all %>% filter(Condition %in% c("Dry", "Wet"))

plot_dw <- make_ivt_slp_wind_plot(
  ivt = ivt_dw, slp = slp_dw, wind = wind_dw,
  labels = labels_dw,
  title_text = "IVT, SLP & Wind Anomalies (Dry & Wet Years)"
)

ggsave("IVT_SLP_Wind_Anomalies_DryWet_4x2_allwind.png", plot = plot_dw,
       width = 11, height = 15, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


ivt_norm   <- ivt_all   %>% filter(Condition == "Normal")
slp_norm   <- slp_all   %>% filter(Condition == "Normal")
wind_norm  <- wind_all  %>% filter(Condition == "Normal")

plot_norm <- make_ivt_slp_wind_plot(
  ivt = ivt_norm, slp = slp_norm, wind = wind_norm,
  labels = labels_norm,
  title_text = "IVT, SLP & Wind Anomalies (Normal Years)"
)

ggsave("IVT_SLP_Wind_Anomalies_Normal_4x1_allwind.png", plot = plot_norm,
       width = 7, height = 15, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```



**precipitation climatology plots**
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)


file_path <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/combined_IMD_rain025_1987_2019.csv"

df <- read.csv(file_path)


df$Date <- as.Date(df$Date)


df <- df %>%
  mutate(Month = month(Date))


climatology <- df %>%
  group_by(Month) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()


month_names <- c("January","February","March","April","May","June",
                 "July","August","September","October","November","December")

climatology$Month <- month_names[climatology$Month]


climatology_final <- climatology %>%
  pivot_longer(-Month, names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Month, values_from = Value) %>%
  select(Variable, January, February, March, April, May, June,
         July, August, September, October, November, December)


print(climatology_final)

write.csv(
  climatology_final,
  file = file.path("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Monthly_Climatology_1987_2019.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

**GET EASTERN AND WESTERN CLIMATOLOGY**
```{r}
df = read.csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/Monthly_Climatology_1987_2019.csv")
head(df)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(Region = ifelse(Lon >= 92, "EP", "WP"))   # EP = Eastern, WP = Western


months <- c("January","February","March","April","May","June",
            "July","August","September","October","November","December")


clim_region <- df %>%
  group_by(Region) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(months), mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Region, names_to = "Month", values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = Value) %>%
  select(Month, EP, WP)


write.csv(
  clim_region,
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/EP_WP_Climatology.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

print(clim_region)
```

**PLOT BASIN DIVISION nkr**

```{r}

library(ggplot2)


df <- read.csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/Monthly_Climatology_1987_2019.csv")


df <- df %>%
  mutate(Region = ifelse(Lon > 92, "Eastern", "Western"))


p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Lon, y = Lat, fill = Region)) +
  
  geom_tile(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +   # <-- THIS creates grid boxes
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Eastern" = "blue", "Western" = "green")
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() +
  
  labs(
    title = "Grid Classification: Eastern vs Western Brahmaputra Basin",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude",
    fill = "Region"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(p)


ggsave(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/EP_WP_Grid_Map.png",
  p,
  width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 400, bg = "white"
)
```



**precipitation spatial plot**
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)


file_path <- "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/combined_IMD_rain025_1987_2019.csv"

df <- read.csv(file_path, check.names = FALSE)


df$Dates <- as.Date(df$Dates, format = "%m/%d/%y")


df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Dates,
    names_to = "Grid",
    values_to = "P"
  )


df_long <- df_long %>%
  separate(Grid, into = c("Lon", "Lat"), sep = "_") %>%
  mutate(
    Lon   = as.numeric(Lon),
    Lat   = as.numeric(Lat),
    Month = month(Dates)
  )


early <- df_long %>%
  filter(Month %in% c(5, 6)) %>%
  group_by(Lon, Lat) %>%
  summarise(Early = sum(P, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


peak <- df_long %>%
  filter(Month %in% c(7, 8)) %>%
  group_by(Lon, Lat) %>%
  summarise(Peak = sum(P, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


late <- df_long %>%
  filter(Month %in% c(9, 10)) %>%
  group_by(Lon, Lat) %>%
  summarise(Late = sum(P, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


monsoon <- df_long %>%
  filter(Month %in% c(6, 7, 8, 9)) %>%
  group_by(Lon, Lat) %>%
  summarise(Monsoon = sum(P, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


final_df <- early %>%
  left_join(peak,    by = c("Lon", "Lat")) %>%
  left_join(late,    by = c("Lon", "Lat")) %>%
  left_join(monsoon, by = c("Lon", "Lat"))


final_df <- final_df %>%
  arrange(Lat, Lon)


write.csv(
  final_df,
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/Seasonal_Climatology_Grids.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


print(head(final_df))




df <- read.csv("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/Seasonal_Climatology_Grids.csv")


df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Early, Peak, Late, Monsoon),
    names_to = "Season",
    values_to = "P"
  )
df_long$P <- df_long$P * 0.0001

season_labels <- c(
  Early   = "Early Monsoon (May–Jun)",
  Peak    = "Peak Monsoon (Jul–Aug)",
  Late    = "Late Monsoon (Sep–Oct)",
  Monsoon = "Total Monsoon (JJAS)"
)

df_long$Season <- factor(df_long$Season, levels = names(season_labels))
df_long$Season <- season_labels[df_long$Season]


p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Lon, y = Lat, fill = P)) +
  
  geom_tile(color = "black", linewidth = 0.15) +
  
  scale_fill_gradientn(
  colors = c("darkblue", "blue", "cyan", "green", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
  limits = c(0, 15),
  name = expression("Precipitation (" * 10^4 * " mm)"),
  guide = guide_colorbar(
    barwidth  = unit(14, "cm"),   
    barheight = unit(0.7, "cm")   
  )
)+
  
  coord_fixed() +
  
  facet_wrap(~Season, ncol = 2) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Precipitation Climatology (1987–2019)",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 12),
    
    panel.grid = element_line(color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.2),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11)
  )


ggsave(
  "/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/precipitation/Seasonal_Climatology_Map.png",
  p,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 400,
  bg = "white"
)

print(p)
```
